title: Health & Glow is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Health & Glow is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Health & Glow in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Health & Glow:
Health & Glow is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow!
